description: Italian American Mafia crime family based in Chicago, Illinois, originating in the city's South Side in the early 1910s. Rose to power in the 1920s under Johnny Torrio and Al Capone during Prohibition. Involved in loansharking, illegal gambling, extortion, political corruption, and murder. Considered one of the most violent Mafia families in the U.S., with over 1,000 murders since the 1920s. Still active but in decline since the late 20th century.

country_links.evidence_quote: Its influence at its peak stretched as far as California , Florida and Nevada and it continues to operate throughout the Midwestern United States and South Florida
country_links.context: The Outfit's influence extended to Canada, as it operated in the Midwest and had ties to Canadian organized crime.

country_links.evidence_quote: Giudice operated an illegal bookmaking business ... and allegedly operated a professional sporting business from Costa Rica ...
country_links.context: The Chicago Outfit operates an illegal sports gambling business through an online company based in Costa Rica.

country_links.evidence_quote: Colosimo was born in Calabria , Italy, in 1878, and immigrated to Chicago in 1895
country_links.context: The Outfit's founder Vincenzo Colosimo was born in Calabria, Italy, and immigrated to Chicago, establishing the organization's roots.

country_links.evidence_quote: In June 1961, Cain was allegedly met by a CIA staffer in Mexico City , he was deported from Mexico in 1962...
country_links.context: The Chicago Outfit had an associate who met with a CIA staffer in Mexico City and was deported from Mexico.

country_links.evidence_quote: Scalise was a suspect in the London-Marlborough jewellery store heist in September 1980
country_links.context: The Chicago Outfit member Joseph Scalise was a suspect in a jewelry store heist in London.

country_links.evidence_quote: Carparelli was sentenced to over 3 years in prison ... for a series of extortion conspiracies within Chicago, Wisconsin, New Jersey and Las Vegas.
country_links.context: The Chicago Outfit operates extortion conspiracies in Chicago, Wisconsin, New Jersey, and Las Vegas.
